text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking past a classroom on my lunch break
when I spot Tamamo Cross inside, head in her
hands.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Man, I don't get it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. So it's got even you stumped?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nice timin'. I just fell for Jordan's bait—hook, line
'n sinker.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That is so not what happened. We were playing
guess the price!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You see, the other day, we showed Tamamo some
of City's makeup, and...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... This one's gotta be expensive. I'm guessin' 10,000 yen. Minimum.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Correct. I got this setting powder at one of my
photoshoots.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Okay, so, how about the lipstick on the far right?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's cheap!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ding, ding, ding! That one's actually mine. It was
only 390 yen!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like, I know you're not into makeup, but you're
always right! Literally how?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well, it's pretty simple. Y'see, expensive stuff... it just smells like money!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So obviously after I heard that, I had to test her
with something that gives off mega bougie vibes.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but these shoes?! They're waaay too fancy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... I mean, they kinda smell like money, but also they kinda don't...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and if you guess right, I'll give you a coupon
for a free meal at the cafeteria!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh man, I gotta get this one right! I really wanna get this one! But I don't got a clue!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Know any tricks that'd help?
choice_data_list: Try doing some weightlifting in them!
Put them on and go for a test run!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Weightlifting could work! Then I could compare
'em to my usual shoes!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's get this show on the road! One,
two, three...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The soles fit my feet like fluffy gloves! And the
cleat plates are hammered in real good!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
These shoes are pretty well made! I think they'd
go for 20,000 yen—no, make it 25,000! And
that's my final answer!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, gotcha. And now for the reveal you've all
been waiting for...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
The answer is 5,000 yen! They're on the cheaper
side!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: They're what?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to see you totally gagged, so I asked
around and my classmates recommended this
affordable brand.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I bet I got you good, didn't I?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm totally got! They're that cheap?! I can't believe it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...I'm definitely snaggin' a pair next time I'm out.
What's the brand name?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Learning about this remarkable bargain puts
Tamamo Cross in a great mood.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
How come I didn't think of that?! Runnin's gonna
be the quickest way to find out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few laps around the track later...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I got this one in the bag! The silky feel 'n
perfect fit! The way the cleat plates are
hammered right in there!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This kinda quality should put the price way over
20,000 yen! Pretty luxurious, yeah? However!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My feet feel right at home in 'em! They feel
familiar, almost.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, I think these are on the cheap side! And
that's my final answer!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you got it totally right! You're so good at this! Okay, here's your free lunch ticket, on me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeeesss!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Tamamo Cross is spotted
humming cheerfully as she eats in the cafeteria.
